root.sql:
select PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as membername, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no,
sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id
,PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_thaidate(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.resignation_approve_date) as resignation_approve_date_tdate
,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_name ,sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date ,PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_thaidate( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date ) as receipt_date_tdate ,sc_com_m_receipt.share_stock ,sc_com_m_receipt.recept_amount ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_desc ,to_date( '!op_date_1!' ) as begin_date ,to_date( '!op_date_2!' ) as end_date from sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group
, sc_com_m_ucf_money_type , sc_com_m_receipt ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type where ( sc_com_m_receipt.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type ) and sc_com_m_receipt.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = 'TNL' and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' and sc_com_m_receipt.share_stock = sc_com_m_receipt.recept_amount and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date between to_date( '!op_date_1!' ) and to_date( '!op_date_2!' ) /*WHERE*/

r_ktm_labour_share_withdraw_zero_nest_ae.sql: SELECT sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no, sc_com_m_receipt_item.seq_no, sc_com_m_receipt_item.description, sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount, sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount, sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no ) and ( ( sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = 'TNL' ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.membership_no = {0} ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) )

r_ktm_labour_share_withdraw_zero_nest.sql:
SELECT tab_data.account_id, tab_data.account_name, tab_data.loan_type, tab_data.loan_type_description, tab_data.principal_amount, tab_data.interest_amount, tab_data.item_amount ,tab_data. loan_type_des from ( /* เงินกู้ */ SELECT sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description, sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount ) as principal_amount, sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount ) as interest_amount, sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount) as item_amount , sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date as receipt_date , sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id as money_type_id ,(sc_lon_m_rule.ref_contract_type) as loan_type_des FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_lon_m_rule, sc_acc_m_account_master, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and ( sc_lon_m_rule.account_id = sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) AND ( sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount <> 0 ) and sc_com_m_receipt.share_stock = sc_com_m_receipt.recept_amount
GROUP BY sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description , sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date , sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id ,sc_lon_m_rule.ref_contract_type
union
SELECT sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id as account_id , sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_name as account_name , sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id as loan_type , sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_name as loan_type_description , sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount ) as principal_amount, sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount ) as interest_amount, sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount) as item_amount , sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date as receipt_date , sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id as money_type_id ,' - ' as loan_type_des FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type
WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) AND ( sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item <> 'LON' ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount <> 0 ) and sc_com_m_receipt.share_stock = sc_com_m_receipt.recept_amount
GROUP BY sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_name , sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date , sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id
) tab_data , sc_fin_m_close_day ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type where sc_fin_m_close_day.journal_date = tab_data.receipt_date and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = tab_data.money_type_id and sc_fin_m_close_day.journal_date between '!op_date_1!' and '!op_date_2!' and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = 'TNL'
